positive: A vibrant, minimalist abstract scene depicting a cosmic journey. The central element is a stylized, glowing nebula forming a spiral shape, representing infinite possibility. This nebula interacts with geometric, crystalline structures that appear to float in deep space. Use a palette of electric indigo, deep cyan, luminous magenta, and gold accents. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, designed as a seamless repeating pattern element. High contrast, clean linework, strong silhouettes, ethereal glow, digital vector art style, 8K resolution, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, signature, realistic photo, messy lines
